subject: Credential addition in NSSMF adapter
commit_message:
Credential addition in NSSMF adapter

Bug fix

Change-Id: Iae0eb5748190449ddcc441d77a3a9529783a4b00

Signed-off-by: jananib <janani.b@huawei.com>
